title: FPV Military Drones
description: A mod that adds military drones to minecraft.
body:
### Description
A mod that adds military drones such as scout drone, kamikaze drone and grenade drone to your game. It is an addon for Minecraft FPV. The mod is still being developed, there're a lot of bugs. This mod adds 3 types of drones to minecraft: Scout Drone, Kamikaze Drone and Grenade Drone. Drone scout let you just fly and nothing else. With the kamikaze drone you can crash into a target and blow it up. And the grenade drone allows you to get close to the enemy and drop a couple of grenades on him, in order to drop a grenade you need to press G, but this can be changed in the control settings. You can also reload the grenade drone by adding 2 tnt to it.



### Requirments
Download [Minecraft FPV](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fpv-drone) mod. without it, this mod won't work.



### Crafts

**Chip**
